name: Fruitcake Cookies
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Green cherries, candied and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the candied and chopped pineapple, cherries, raisins, pecans or walnuts.
2. In another bowl, cream the butter until light and fluffy.
3. Gradually add the brown sugar to the butter mixture, stirring well.
4. Add egg yolks to the mixture, mixing until combined.
5. Dissolve baking soda in milk and stir into the butter mixture.
6. Mix in brandy, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
7. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
8. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the batter using a spatula or wooden spoon.
9. Stir in the fruit mixture until evenly distributed.
10. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto greased cookie sheets.
11. Bake at 325°F for 12 to 15 minutes, or until golden brown and set on top.
12. Allow cookies to cool on wire racks before serving.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
